text: A street scene in an urban area, likely India. Two uniformed security guards (one in light blue, one in white) stand near a blue metal fence in the foreground. Behind them is a multi-story building with balconies, laundry hanging, and a utility pole. A blue car is visible on the left, and a person is walking away on the right. A sign with a red circle and a white cross is visible on the right side of the frame.
